assumptions.note: Costs are estimates based on measured median latency on the benchmarking machine.  Cold-start penalties, network I/O, storage, and data-transfer costs are excluded.  Prices are approximate as of 2025-Q3 — verify current rates before production planning.

on_device.notes: Zero cloud spend.  Model runs on-device (mobile / edge CPU). Requires ~50 MB RAM.  One-time model distribution cost only. Recommended for high-throughput real-time liveness checks.

aws_ec2_c5_xlarge_parallel.notes: 4 parallel workers.  Best for batch processing jobs.

aws_lambda_512mb.notes: Scales to zero.  Cold-start adds 200-800ms.  Best for sporadic traffic < 50 req/s.

google_cloud_run.notes: 1 vCPU, 256 MB.  Scales to zero.  Best for REST API with variable traffic.

azure_functions_512mb.notes: Consumption plan.  Similar trade-offs to Lambda.

cost_per_1m_images.recommendation: On-device for mobile liveness detection (zero cost, lowest latency). Cloud Run or Lambda for server-side REST API with variable load. EC2 c5.xlarge for high-throughput batch processing jobs.
